programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Heropanti
programme.desc: An impossible love story between Pablo and Dempis that stands in the face of ancient traditions and terrorism that threatens their lives and their city. Tiger Shroff, Kriti Sanon, Parthaa Akerkar, Anuradha Chandan, Sunil Grover, Sabir Khan, Sanjeev Dutta.

programme.title: Aankh Micholi
programme.desc: A family of misfits tries to get their daughter married to a well-settled NRI before he learns that she suffers from a problem. They go out of their way to conceal the truth—only to realize that he too has a big secret! Umesh Shukla.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Aankh Micholi
programme.desc: A family of misfits tries to get their daughter married to a well-settled NRI before he learns that she suffers from a problem. They go out of their way to conceal the truth—only to realize that he too has a big secret! Umesh Shukla.

programme.title: No One Killed Jessica
programme.desc: Journalist, Meera teams up with Sabrina Lall whose sister has been murdered by the son of a Congress party Member of Parliament in Haryana. As Meera gets interested in the case, she wants to bring justice to her case. Rani Mukerji, Vidya Balan, Myra Karn, Neil Bhoopalam, Rajesh Sharma, Raj Kumar Gupta, Raj Kumar Gupta.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Behen Hogi Teri
programme.desc: With their traditions of not considering their neighborhood girls as potential lovers but just as sisters, Gattu is facing a big problem in convincing Bonney with his love. Rajkummar Rao, Shruti Haasan, Gautam Gulati, Darshan Jariwala, Ranjeet Bedi, Ajay Pannalal, Vinit Vyas, Sanchit Gupta.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: No One Killed Jessica
programme.desc: Journalist, Meera teams up with Sabrina Lall whose sister has been murdered by the son of a Congress party Member of Parliament in Haryana. As Meera gets interested in the case, she wants to bring justice to her case. Rani Mukerji, Vidya Balan, Myra Karn, Neil Bhoopalam, Rajesh Sharma, Raj Kumar Gupta, Raj Kumar Gupta.

programme.title: Behen Hogi Teri
programme.desc: With their traditions of not considering their neighborhood girls as potential lovers but just as sisters, Gattu is facing a big problem in convincing Bonney with his love. Rajkummar Rao, Shruti Haasan, Gautam Gulati, Darshan Jariwala, Ranjeet Bedi, Ajay Pannalal, Vinit Vyas, Sanchit Gupta.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Behen Hogi Teri
programme.desc: With their traditions of not considering their neighborhood girls as potential lovers but just as sisters, Gattu is facing a big problem in convincing Bonney with his love. Rajkummar Rao, Shruti Haasan, Gautam Gulati, Darshan Jariwala, Ranjeet Bedi, Ajay Pannalal, Vinit Vyas, Sanchit Gupta.

programme.title: Raajneeti
programme.desc: Samar Pertap has to return to the U.S.A to obtain his PHD and see his Irish-American girlfriend, however, his father gets murdered thus, he stays home to avenge his death to find himself involved in ruthless politics and deceit. Ajay Devgan, Ranbir Kapoor, Nana Patekar, Katrina Kaif, Arjun Rampal, Prakash Jha, Prakash Jha.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Logout
programme.desc: A young influencer at the peak of success, Pratyush is just moments away from 10 million followers when an obsessed fan hijacks his phone and threatens everything he's built. Amit Golani.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Raajneeti
programme.desc: Samar Pertap has to return to the U.S.A to obtain his PHD and see his Irish-American girlfriend, however, his father gets murdered thus, he stays home to avenge his death to find himself involved in ruthless politics and deceit. Ajay Devgan, Ranbir Kapoor, Nana Patekar, Katrina Kaif, Arjun Rampal, Prakash Jha, Prakash Jha.

programme.desc: A young influencer at the peak of success, Pratyush is just moments away from 10 million followers when an obsessed fan hijacks his phone and threatens everything he's built. Amit Golani.
